text:
The department shall post a complete schedule of registration fees on the Internet.

Transferred, redesignated and amended from Transportation Code, Section 502.159 by Acts 2011, 82nd Leg., R.S., Ch. 1296 (H.B. 2357 ), Sec. 107, eff. January 1, 2012.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 502. Registration of Vehicles
##### § 502.190 — Schedule of Registration Fees

The department shall post a complete schedule of registration fees on the Internet.

Transferred, redesignated and amended from Transportation Code, Section 502.159 by Acts 2011, 82nd Leg., R.S., Ch. 1296 (H.B. 2357 ), Sec. 107, eff. January 1, 2012.
